calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Hai Le, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jan-08-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-10-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
